title: QFINHUB Quality Auditor — Decision Log — Safe Mode Day 1

decisions.reason: Outreach must go through Phase 14 Outreach Agent + Auditor approval. No auto-outreach outside quality gate.
Auto-news content without quality gate violates V2 rules. Must go through new query-driven Content Strategist.
All 10 URLs: HTTP 200, index/follow, self-canonical, in sitemap, not cleanup-lag, not recently requested, not noindex/404/redirect. Safe GSC UI submission.
decisions.urls: To be filled from GSC UI result

decisions.reason: Safe Mode Day 1 — new content not allowed unless explicitly approved. No opportunities met 85/100 threshold.
7 fixed pages submitted Phase 13C.7 are still in 48h cooldown. CTR edits before re-crawl wastes effort. Wait for GSC re-crawl data.
Links from indexed Tier 1 calcs to important pages. Natural anchor text. No spam blocks.
Next follow-ups due Jun 7. No follow-ups due today.
Monitor only. Do not post Pins 3-5. 2 test pins ~120h live — check Pinterest analytics.
